requirement_topic.en: IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 Evidence for BESS Safety

summary.en: IEC 62619:2022 is the current IEC safety standard for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications, and the IEC 62933 series covers electrical energy storage systems. UAE regulators, utilities, project owners, insurers, or civil-defence reviewers may request IEC-based test evidence even where the federal regulated-product route is component-specific rather than a single whole-unit BESS approval. Dubai Civil Defence or MoIAT/project reviewers may also reference ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A, 6th Edition (2026) as fire-safety evaluation evidence for BESS thermal-runaway propagation and mitigation.
summary.zh: IEC 62619:2022是现行IEC工业用二次锂电芯和电池安全标准，IEC 62933系列覆盖电力储能系统。即使联邦受管产品路径按组件适用而非单一整机BESS批准，阿联酋监管机构、公用事业单位、项目业主、保险方或民防审查方也可能要求提供IEC测试证据。迪拜民防或MoIAT/项目审查方也可能引用ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A第6版（2026年）作为BESS热失控蔓延及缓解的消防安全评估证据。
summary.zht: IEC 62619:2022是現行IEC工業用二次鋰電芯和電池安全標準，IEC 62933系列覆蓋電力儲能系統。即使聯邦受管產品路徑按組件適用而非單一整機BESS批准，阿聯酋監管機構、公用事業單位、項目業主、保險方或民防審查方也可能要求提供IEC測試證據。杜拜民防或MoIAT／項目審查方也可能引用ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A第6版（2026年）作為BESS熱失控蔓延及緩解的消防安全評估證據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933 series, including safety and system requirements for electrical energy storage systems

ANSI/CAN/UL 9540A, 6th Edition (2026) — fire-safety evaluation method for thermal-runaway propagation in BESS, where referenced by Dubai Civil Defence, MoIAT/project reviewers, insurers, or project specifications

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 36276-2023 for lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage and GB/T 36558 for operation and maintenance of electrochemical energy storage stations. These Chinese standards are useful for technical comparison but do not automatically substitute for IEC 62619 or IEC 62933 evidence requested by a UAE customer, utility, insurer, or authority.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 36276-2023规范电力储能用锂离子电池，并使用GB/T 36558规范电化学储能电站运行维护。这些中国标准可用于技术对比，但不能自动替代阿联酋客户、公用事业单位、保险方或主管机关要求的IEC 62619或IEC 62933证据。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 36276-2023規範電力儲能用鋰離子電池，並使用GB/T 36558規範電化學儲能電站運行維護。這些中國標準可用於技術對比，但不能自動替代阿聯酋客戶、公用事業單位、保險方或主管機關要求的IEC 62619或IEC 62933證據。

gap.en: Prepare a crosswalk showing cell, module, rack, BMS, PCS, enclosure, thermal-management, and system-level evidence against IEC 62619 and the relevant IEC 62933 parts. Chinese GB test reports should be reviewed clause by clause and supplemented with IEC reports where the UAE project specification calls for IEC documents. If Dubai Civil Defence, MoIAT/project reviewers, insurers, or the customer reference UL 9540A, provide current 6th Edition fire-test evidence rather than relying on cell/component safety reports alone.
gap.zh: 应准备电芯、模组、电池架、BMS、PCS、外壳、热管理和系统级证据与IEC 62619及相关IEC 62933部分的条款对照。若阿联酋项目规范要求IEC文件，应逐条审查中国GB检测报告并补充IEC报告。如迪拜民防、MoIAT/项目审查方、保险方或客户引用UL 9540A，应提供现行第6版火灾试验证据，而不是仅依赖电芯/组件安全报告。
gap.zht: 應準備電芯、模組、電池架、BMS、PCS、外殼、熱管理和系統級證據與IEC 62619及相關IEC 62933部分的條款對照。若阿聯酋項目規範要求IEC文件，應逐條審查中國GB檢測報告並補充IEC報告。如杜拜民防、MoIAT／項目審查方、保險方或客戶引用UL 9540A，應提供現行第6版火災試驗證據，而不是僅依賴電芯／組件安全報告。

mandatory_status.target: Often project, utility, insurer, or authority specified; not treated here as a confirmed blanket federal whole-unit certification mandate for all BESS
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T standards are generally recommended unless incorporated into mandatory regulation or contract; GB 44240-2024 is a GB standard for electrochemical energy storage station safety

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IEC 62619:2022 and IEC 62933 evidence is a practical UAE BESS due-diligence baseline, and UL 9540A 6th Edition fire-test evidence may be requested where Dubai Civil Defence, MoIAT/project reviewers, insurers, or project specifications reference it. The legal trigger must be checked against the specific MoIAT scope, emirate approval, utility interconnection requirement, insurance condition, and project specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933证据是阿联酋BESS尽调的实务基线；如迪拜民防、MoIAT/项目审查方、保险方或项目规范引用UL 9540A，也可能要求提供第6版火灾试验证据。法律触发点必须结合具体MoIAT范围、酋长国批准、公用事业并网要求、保险条件和项目规范核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IEC 62619:2022和IEC 62933證據是阿聯酋BESS盡調的實務基線；如杜拜民防、MoIAT／項目審查方、保險方或項目規範引用UL 9540A，也可能要求提供第6版火災試驗證據。法律觸發點必須結合具體MoIAT範圍、酋長國批准、公用事業併網要求、保險條件和項目規範核實。
